source.title: Rejected Take Off Distance OEI Clear Area
source.rfm_source: Leonardo AW139 Rotorcraft Flight Manual (RFM), Ed. 2, Rev. 32

notes: Engine derived from vector-first extraction of Figure 4-54.
Left-panel max OAT line uses the two exact vector strokes that form the 50°C / MAX OAT LIMIT trace.
Center and right panels use exact vector strokes from the PDF content stream.

notes.v07: Center weight curve semantics remapped by physical left-to-right ordering for Figure 4-54.
notes.v11: Pressure altitude overlay uses calibrated x-axis ticks for 8000 to -1000 ft.
